channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cat hired as museum security officer
item.description: Bone Jovi now oversees security at the Bone Museum in Brooklyn, New York.

item.title: Australia's largest cocaine seizure found buried underground
item.description: Authorities uncovered three tons of cocaine in plastic containers hidden in underground bunkers with false floors.

item.title: Three dead, seven wounded in rare Philippines school shooting, police say
item.description: Two students armed with handguns opened fire at a high school in the central Philippines, killing three classmates and wounding seven others, police reported.

item.title: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer announces resignation with 'good grace'
item.description: Prime Minister Keir Starmer addressed the public from outside 10 Downing Street on Monday.
